prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0d87d2a6`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `0d87d2a6` ARC2 package and built the artifacts end to end. The verifier draws lines only from opposite-border `1` endpoints, then recolors any `2` component touched by those lines; the generator mirrors the official family with sparse black backgrounds, axis-aligned red rectangles, border endpoints, and 1-3 line segments. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` verified examples, and I visually checked the preview sheet.

I used the summary hint as a starting point but corrected it in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0d87d2a6/notes.md): the “any aligned `1`s” reading is too loose on the held-out layout, and I documented the edge-graze ambiguity there. No new primitive was added; the existing DSL/frontier/object ops were enough.
